description: Style NoteIn a myriad of colours, prints and patterns, soft cotton t-shirts from french connection look as good as they feel. Up your glam quotient by wearing this graphic tee with a blazer for urban style.Product DetailsGreen t-shirt has a round neck, short sleeves, print on the front and a brand tag appliqued above the left hemMaterial and Care100% cottonWash with similar coloursIron on reverse sideSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
